parameters.query:
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(c.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))),
  'company',
  c.name,
  NULL,
  c.industry,
  (c.metadata->>'id')::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                    c.name,
    'nickname',                c.nickname,
    'industry',                c.industry,
    'company_code',            c.company_code,
    'wiki',                    c.wiki,
    'is_item_manufacturer',    c.is_item_manufacturer,
    'is_vehicle_manufacturer', c.is_vehicle_manufacturer,
    'source_id',               c.source_id,
    'metadata',                c.metadata,
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(c.name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.nickname, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.industry, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (name) *
  FROM companies
  ORDER BY name, source_id
) c
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc ON esc.entity_type = 'company'
  AND esc.uex_slug = trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(c.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g')))
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
